calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Wilbert Carney, a/k/a Wilbert T. Carney, a/k/a Wilbert Theodis Carney, dba Carney's Plastering.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Kevin Iwanashi, a Collector for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Wilbert Carney, a/k/a Wilbert T. Carney, a/k/a Wilbert Theodis Carney, dba Carney's Plastering.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 18, 2017 and served on January 16, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on March 9, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 31, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Wilbert Carney, a/k/a Wilbert T. Carney, a/k/a Wilbert Theodis Carney, dba Carney's Plastering, as follows:

Damages - $51,550.55.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,498.94.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $699.68.

Total - $70,949.17.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
